title: selaginella chrysorrhizos
intro: Selaginella chrysorrhizos, a species of the Selaginella genus, is a type of ancient, vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, often referred to as a living fossil due to its unchanged morphology over millions of years. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Selaginella chrysorrhizos include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer activities. Selaginella chrysorrhizos can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat a range of conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
